calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Injunctive And Monetary Relief And For An Award Of Its Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs, Pursuant To Section 5211 Of Article 52 Of The San Francisco Police Code
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua Ridless, Esq. 415-614-2600 of the Ridless Law Office for Plaintiff.
Barry W. Lee, Esq. for Third Party CP III Rincon Towers ad Specially Appearing for Defendant Geystar Real Estate.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant argues wrong parties sued, request to deny the motion without prejudice so Plaintiff can amend a complaint and refile motion. Plaintiff argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

PLAINTIFF TEL-ONE NETWORK SERVICES, INC.'s Motion For Injunctive And Monetary Relief And For An Award Of Its Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs, Pursuant To Section 5211 Of Article 52 Of The San Francisco Police Code.

Taken Under submission. ***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an Order Denying Motion for Injunctive Relief, etc. is signed. (see scanned order for details)***
